title: Poppy document
description: A Poppy server-driven UI document, version 0.1. The root of every Poppy wire-format payload. See ADR-0006 for versioning rules.

$schema.description: Optional canonical schema URL for editor integration. Renderers do not consult this field; they use 'version'.

version.description: Wire-format version, MAJOR.MINOR. Renderers reject unknown majors and forward-compat across minors (ignoring unknown fields on known components). See ADR-0006.

Component.description: Discriminated union of all v0.1 component types.

Action.description: Discriminated union of all v0.1 action types. Renderers dispatch actions to the host application's onAction callback verbatim.
